creator: andrej.zverev@gmail.com
text:
Hello, I have few questions to you.
1. What was you previous FreeBSD version before you migrate to 8.0BETA3 ?
2. If it was not clean install, then did you force rebuild all ports
that you have installed?
3. Is you default brower is firefox, if you start it from CLI: firefox
http://cpan.uwinnipeg.ca/search?query=Padre%3A%3APlugin%3A%3A&mode=dist
it's will run OK?
